features: RFID protection: thanks to the integrated RFID chip, you are always protected from fraud attacks on your credit cards and unauthorised scans.
Clever division - Our hodalump wallet is a real space miracle with an intelligent compartment division. The wallet offers enough space for notes of all sizes.
Real leather in premium quality - All our wallets are made from 100% genuine leather. This makes our wallets extremely robust and durable. The leather is natural, oiled and polished.

PRODUCT BENEFITS Our hodalump wallets come in a simple, elegant vintage design, which of course makes them perfect to match any outfit. Thanks to the intelligent divisions and the large coin compartment, you can keep an overview.

Perfect gift idea - With our elegant hodalump wallets, joy and quality for eternity. The wallets are ideal as a gift for any occasion. Whether Christmas, birthday, Easter, Valentine's Day or just because.
description: Product description OSIKO leather wallet Material: full cowhide leather - high quality, natural, oiled and polished. Dimensions: 11 cm x 7 cm x 1 cm. Structure: 3 credit card slots 1 viewing window (mesh compartment). 1 note compartment. 1 change compartment with press stud closure. Special Features/High Quality Products made exclusively by hand. All compartments are extra stitched for stability and durability Zip with extra leather puller. Lined inside. Perfect as a gift for him - on birthdays, anniversaries, Mother's Day, Oktoberfest, Christmas and other celebrations. ‚ú™ Company introduction. OSIKO Lederwaren GmbH is a premium quality supplier for all types of leather goods for Germany and Austria. The brand "Hodalump & Ratschkatl" has been developed with care and attention to detail for the ruling zeitgeist and appeals to tradition-conscious customers of all ages. The design of our products maintains the open and modern traditional country house style, with which its own charm. Our creative designer team is constantly developing new models that reflect the spirit of time and image of the brand "Hodalump & Ratschkatl". ‚ú™ Manufacturing and quality: For the production of our products, only hand-selected leather hides made of cowhide are processed, which are tanned in an elaborate process, and then finely sanded and waxed. In this way, the leather used gets its inimitable and unique vintage look. All items from the wide range are handmade without exception. Safety Warning The wallet still darkens and continues to expand
